title: St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy
tagline: St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy, Kerala

overview.short: St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy, is one of the 10 Foranes or deaneries under the Syro-Malabar Catholic Eparchy of Irinjalakuda, which was established in 1978 by the bifurcation of Thrissur Diocese. Prior to that, Chalakudy was part of Thrissur diocese, the most ancient Diocese of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Church. Thrissur diocese has since been elevated to an archdiocese, Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Thrissur, within which comes the Irinjalakuda diocese.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Holy Land Chalakudy
topPlaces.description: Holy Land Chalakudy, is the replica of the original Holy Land according to The Bible, situated at Chalakudy in Thrissur, Kerala, India. The major attractions include statutes resembling the various incidents of The Bible.

topPlaces.name: Regional Science Centre, Chalakudy
topPlaces.description: Regional Science Centre, Chalakudy is a science museum located in Chalakudy, Thrissur district of Kerala, India. It is an autonomous institution established by the Government of Kerala, as a center for popularisation of science and scientific temper among the general public, especially among children.

topPlaces.name: Chalakudy
topPlaces.description: Chalakudy (Malayalam: [tʃaːlɐkːuɖi]) is a municipal town on the banks of Chalakudy River in Thrissur district of the Kerala state in India. It is the headquarters of Chalakudy taluk.

topPlaces.name: Perambra, Thrissur
topPlaces.description: Perambra is a small town located in the Thrissur district of Kerala, South India. It is located on National Highway (NH) 544, 23 km south of the city of Thrissur and about 7 km north of Chalakudy.

topPlaces.name: Divine Retreat Centre, Muringoor
topPlaces.description: The Divine Retreat Center is a Retreat centre situated in Muringoor, near Chalakudy, Kerala, India near. It is part of the renewal movement of the Vincentian Congregation of India, who have been conducting retreats in parishes in Kerala since the 1950s.

topPlaces.name: Agronomic Research Station, Chalakudy
topPlaces.description: Agronomic Research Station, Chalakudy is a research Station under the Central Zone of Kerala Agricultural University at Chalakudy in Thrissur district of Kerala, India. This research Station was established in 1972 by the Agricultural Department of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Muringur Vadakkummuri
topPlaces.description: Muringur Vadakkummuri is a village in Thrissur district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Our Lady of Perpetual Help Church, West Chalakudy
topPlaces.description: The Church of the Our Lady of Perpetual Help, popularly known as Nithyasahaya Matha Palli or Moonjeli Palli is a parish church coming under the Syro-Malabar Catholic Eparchy of Irinjalakuda. It is situated along the Chalakudy - Ashtamichira Road, about 1 km from Chalakudi railway station at a small hamlet by name, Munjeli, in the south Indian state of Kerala.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy?
faq.a: Stays in St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Mary's Forane Church, Chalakudy?
faq.a: The top attractions are Holy Land Chalakudy, Regional Science Centre, Chalakudy, Chalakudy, Perambra, Thrissur, Divine Retreat Centre, Muringoor.
